meta_title: For Students: project management to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Project Management for Students: Stop Slow Coding Today
content.seo_description: Overcome slow development speed with this intermediate project management checklist for students. Leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to build faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, shift from ad-hoc coding to a structured project management workflow. Use Antigravity for architectural planning and Claude Code for rapid implementation. By breaking features into atomic tasks and automating boilerplate through AI-assisted CLI commands, you reduce context switching and accelerate your path to a production-ready portfolio project.
content.intro:
The screen glows with an unfinished feature, the cursor blinks in a rhythmic taunt, and your project deadline looms like a storm cloud. You are trapped in the 'student developer death spiral'—where every line of code feels like navigating a labyrinth without a map. The frustration isn't your talent; it is your process.

Great engineering isn't just about writing code; it's about managing complexity before it consumes you. By integrating professional project management frameworks with AI-powered development tools, you transform your workflow from a frantic struggle into a precise, systematic execution. It is time to stop guessing and start building with the velocity of a senior engineer.

steps.title: Define Atomic Objectives
steps.description: Break your massive feature list into tasks that take no longer than 90 minutes. This prevents cognitive overload and keeps your momentum high.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements and break the next feature into 90-minute actionable tasks with clear acceptance criteria.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Use AI to generate the folder structure and boilerplate before writing a single line of business logic to ensure scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable folder structure for a Next.js 14 app with TypeScript, following professional enterprise standards.

steps.title: Automated Context Loading
steps.description: Feed your project context into Claude Code so it understands your existing patterns, reducing the need for manual explanations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the core architectural patterns and dependencies in my current codebase for AI context injection.

steps.title: Iterative Implementation
steps.description: Implement features one by one, using Claude Code to handle the repetitive boilerplate while you focus on the core logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the implementation plan for the authentication middleware, focusing on security best practices and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Implement authentication middleware with JWT validation'

steps.title: Automated Quality Assurance
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your implementation, ensuring your code remains robust as you expand.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive unit tests for the recently created authentication module using Jest and React Testing Library.

pro_tips: Never start a session without a clear 'Definition of Done' for your current task to prevent scope creep.
Use Claude Code's history feature to review how you solved similar bugs in the past, saving hours of debugging.
Treat your README.md as a living project management document; update it after every major milestone.
Automate your environment setup with shell scripts so you can spin up a new project in seconds, not hours.
If the AI provides a solution that feels 'magic' or complex, ask it to explain the trade-offs before accepting the code.
content.next_steps: After completing this checklist, commit your code to a new repository, write a technical post-mortem about the challenges you solved, and share your project link in our builder's Discord channel.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop struggling and start shipping. Don't let your ideas stay in the draft folder. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
